name: Talked to insurance adjuster about my neck claim, did I mess up?
description: Be cautious; consult lawyer before more talks.

mainEntity.name: Talked to insurance adjuster about my neck claim, did I mess up?

acceptedAnswer.text: Be cautious; consult lawyer before more talks.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Possibly; adjusters seek statements to deny—say little without lawyer.** Recorded talks used against you.[2] Key factors: Don't admit partial fault; request all in writing; no off-record chats. Common mistake; review what said. Lawyer protects from lowball offers.
